query: SELECT id, name, usernameX, usernameY, usernameFontSize, usernameFontFamily, usernameFontColor, usernameAlign, passwordX, passwordY, passwordFontSize, passwordFontFamily, passwordFontColor, passwordAlign, qrCodeEnabled, qrCodeX, qrCodeY, qrCodeSize FROM card_templates ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
